title: Neon Wool Texture Pack
description: A vibrant neon-style wool texture pack that gives Minecraft wool blocks a glowing, futuristic look. Perfect for Bedwars, Skywars, PvP maps, and colorful creations. (NeonWool)
body:
### ⚡ Bring speed & style to every rush with the **Neon Wool Texture Pack** 🧱🔥
 
**Made for Bedwars 🛏️ & Skywars ⚔️, this pack gives your wool blocks a clean glowing neon look that stands out perfectly while bridging, clutching, and rushing across maps. 🌌**
 

- 🔥 Bright neon textures
- ⚡ Smooth & clean for fast bridging
- 🎮 Perfect for PvP gameplay
- 🌙 Looks amazing in every match_**_

**Make every bridge look sharper, faster, and cleaner. 💫**
